heading: Privileges and immunities of mission of nonparty to Vienna Convention
label: 254b Privileges and immunities of mission of nonparty to Vienna Convention
text: With respect to a nonparty to the Vienna Convention, the mission, the members of the mission, their families, and diplomatic couriers shall enjoy the privileges and immunities specified in the Vienna Convention.
notes: Amendments1982— substituted “With respect to a nonparty to the Vienna Convention, the mission, the members of the mission, their families, and diplomatic couriers” for “Members of the mission of a sending state which has not ratified the Vienna Convention, their families, and the diplomatic couriers of such state,”.Pub. L. 97–241
